message:
chore: bump workspace version to v0.2.15, switch beads_rust to local path dep

Workspace version bump:
- All workspace crates updated from 0.2.14 to 0.2.15:
  mcp-agent-mail, mcp-agent-mail-cli, mcp-agent-mail-conformance,
  mcp-agent-mail-core, mcp-agent-mail-db, mcp-agent-mail-guard,
  mcp-agent-mail-search-core, mcp-agent-mail-server, mcp-agent-mail-share,
  mcp-agent-mail-storage, mcp-agent-mail-tools, mcp-agent-mail-wasm

beads_rust dependency change:
- Switched beads_rust from crates.io registry v0.1.14 to local path
  dependency (../beads_rust) at v0.1.31. This adds a workspace-level
  [patch] entry pointing to the local checkout, ensuring the project
  tracks the latest local beads_rust which includes newer frankensqlite
  (fsqlite-observability) and additional deps (shell-words, tempfile).

fsqlite-observability resolution change:
- beads_rust's fsqlite-observability dependency now resolves to the
  registry v0.1.2 build instead of the prior local/registry v0.1.1,
  reflecting the local beads_rust's updated dependency graph.

Transitive dependency updates (via Cargo.lock refresh):
- windows-sys: multiple dependents moved from 0.59.0 to 0.60.2/0.61.2
  (dirs, errno, filedescriptor, mio, parking_lot_core, rustix, tempfile,
  tokio, windows-console)
- self_update (v0.42.0): gained either, flate2, tar, zip 2.4.2 deps for
  broader archive format support in self-update workflows
- zipsign-api: gained base64 dependency
- arbitrary: gained derive_arbitrary proc-macro dependency
- New transitive crates: derive_arbitrary v1.4.2, tar v0.4.45,
  xattr v1.6.1, zip v2.4.2 (coexists with existing zip v8.1.0)
- mcp-agent-mail-cli and mcp-agent-mail-share: zip dep disambiguated
  to zip 8.1.0 (since zip 2.4.2 is now also in the graph)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
